_doc: Example baselines file consumed by scripts/drift_check_all.py. Copy to strategy_baselines.json (gitignored at deploy time) and replace the example values with the actual promotion-time stats for each strategy. Re-baseline whenever a strategy is intentionally re-tuned and re-promoted.

_fields.strategy_id: Must match the strategy_id passed to BacktestEngine and recorded in TRADE_ENGINE journal events.
_fields.n_trades: Number of trades the baseline was computed from. Larger is more reliable; >100 is the floor for drift-monitor confidence.
_fields.avg_r: Promotion-time mean per-trade R (can be negative if the strategy is mean-reversion playing for >50% win rate at sub-1R).
_fields.r_stddev: Promotion-time per-trade R standard deviation. Drives the drift-monitor z-score on avg_r.
